data.title: 国际服神秘学研究部特别礼物
data.summary: 💫 A New Year begins with the Occult Society! Sensei, we hope you're enjoying a joyful and happy star
data.body:
💫 A New Year begins with the Occult Society!

Sensei, we hope you're enjoying a joyful and happy start to the New Year! 🔮

To celebrate your new beginning, the Occult Society students have prepared a special gift for you!
Log in during the event period and don’t miss your chance to receive all the on-time rewards! 🎁

➡️More info: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3354449
